  • weekly picks (Feb 4 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 Feb 4th week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    02/24

    1. s41467-026-69839-6 Graphene demon wave transistor (Nature Communications)

    2. s41467-026-69635-2 A unified symmetry framework for spin–ferroelectric coupling in altermagnetic multiferroics (Nature Communications)

    3. s42005-026-02511-z Unified mechanism of charge-density-wave and high-Tc superconductivity protected from oxygen vacancies in bilayer nickelates (Communications Physics)

    4. s41563-026-02516-7 Six-state clock physics in an atomically thin antiferromagnet (Nature Materials)

    5. s41598-026-41226-7 A gated-attention multi-prior injection diffusion model for Huashan rock art image restoration (Scientific Reports)

    6. q4gq-dkkp Exploring transition pathways in the Landau-Brazovskii model (PRR)

    7. fksg-y9xr Pressure-induced Lifshitz transition in $\mathrm{Cs}{\mathrm{V}}{3}{\mathrm{Sb}}{5}$ evidenced by the quantum oscillation measurements (PRR)

    8. 3wbz-lq3p Stability of thermal equilibrium in long-range quantum systems (PRR)

    9. 4s8v-32r8 Coherent control of ionization via stabilization by resonant pulse pairs (PRR)

    10. 9fq1-vpqz Embedding physical symmetries into machine-learned reduced plasma physics models via data augmentation (PRR)

    11. pgxg-mhjr Belief propagation for finite networks using a symmetry-breaking source node (PRR)

    12. 8h9h-m7ks Nonequilibrium transport through an interacting monitored quantum dot (PRR)

    13. 2mn1-6tb4 Robustness optimization for compact free-electron laser driven by laser wakefield accelerators (PRR)

    14. v9ln-c4v2 Network requirements for distributed quantum computation (PRR)

    15. 5s6l-vc71 Hall effect in topologically trivial isolated flat-band systems (PRRL)
